zh.lifeSummary: 當Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille於大約0912年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，他的父親Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille23歲，母親Countess Alava23歲。他於0929年與Hodierne de Poher結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約0963年在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾藍代維內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille于大约0912年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，他的父亲Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille23岁，母亲Countess Alava23岁。他于0929年与Hodierne de Poher结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约0963年在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾藍代維內。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: nickname from Middle English, Old French prince (from Latin princeps).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Prinz ‘prince’, or its Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or some other Slavic cognate Princ, from princ ‘prince’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Primc: status name for one who lives in the house of his father-in-law, from a derivative of primiti ‘to accept, to take over’.

variants.name: Prinz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Ulrich, Arno, Friedrich, Hans, Klaus, Mechthild.

German: nickname from Middle High German prinze ‘prince’, presumably denoting someone who behaved in a regal manner or who had won the title in some contest of skill. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Budig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Kurt, Otto.

Germanized form of Sorbian Budych, Budich, and Budik, Czech Budík: from a pet form of a personal name, such as Lower Sorbian Budysław, Upper Sorbian Budisław, based on the Old Slavic element bud ‘to inspire’ (see Budish ).

variants.name: Budish
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Budiš, Polish Budzisz: from a pet form of any of Slavic compound personal names based on the element bud ‘to inspire’ (from Old Slavic buditi), e.g. Budislav (Polish Budzisław) ‘inspiring glory’.

en.lifeSummary: When Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille was born about 0912, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille, was 23 and his mother, Countess Alava, was 23. He married Hodierne de Poher in 0929. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 0963, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Landévennec, Finistère, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille est né environ 0912, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Countess Alava, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Hodierne de Poher en 0929. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 0963, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Landévennec, Finistère, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille um 0912 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille 23 und seine Mutter Countess Alava 23. Er hat 0929 Hodierne de Poher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 0963 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Landévennec, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille è nato il circa 0912 nel Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Countess Alava, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Hodierne de Poher nel 0929. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 0963, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Landévennec, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouailleが約0912年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで生まれた時，父Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouailleは23歳，母Countess Alavaは23歳であった。0929年にHodierne de Poherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約0963年に故郷で53歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンフィニストeアランドeベネックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille(이)가 대략 0912년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Alava(은)는 23세였다. 그는 0929년 Hodierne de Poher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 0963년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 랜드e븐크에 묻혔다.

mg.about 0912–about 0963: tany ho any amin'ny 0912–tany ho any amin'ny 0963

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille nasceu aproximadamente 0912, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Countess Alava, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Hodierne de Poher em 0929. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 0963, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Landévennec, Finistère, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille родился около 0912 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Alava, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Hodierne de Poher в 0929 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 0963 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ландeвеннек, финистeр, бретагн, Франция.

sm.about 0912–about 0963: e tusa o le 0912–e tusa o le 0963

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Budig Berhuc Prince of Cornouaille nació aproximadamente 0912, en Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Diles Heirquer Ehebre Prince of Cornouaille, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Countess Alava, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Hodierne de Poher en 0929. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 0963, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Landévennec, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.
